Leckie adjusts to post-war life by resuming his old job and starting a new relationship, but for Sledge, unsure why he survived the war seemingly unscathed, adjustment will require more time.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: We meet our anti-hero Ray, as well as his daughter, Brittany, ex-wife, Jacinta, unwell brother, Bruce, best friend, Gary, and boss, Freddy. Freddy owes Ray money which he doesn't have, as usual so he sends Ray off with newly hired heavy, Nick, to collect and keep a 10k debt. Nick hasn't collected before and proves ineffective, so Ray has to step in and do it his way to get results. Ray meets Ally at the dog park and there is immediate chemistry - but he doesn't act on it, feeling that she's out of his league. Gary is in trouble with his Russian wife, Tatiana, over the discovery of a porn DVD and asks Ray to take the blame. While out with Brittany having ice-cream they bump into some young men who knock her ice-cream to the ground and disrespect Ray. Ray assaults one of the young men responsible and while escaping the scene he runs into Ally and takes the opportunity to make his feelings a little clearer. Ally gives Ray her number.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Ray kidnaps a man named Luke Henson and "takes care" of him out in a forest. Brittany questions her dad about Santa Claus and unicorns. The police have identified Ray as the young man's assailant; he informs Bruce that he has to go to court. Ray has his first date with Ally. It goes well. Freddy informs Ray that he was mistaken about Luke Henson. Ray is not happy about having killed the guy. Showing some moral compass and compassion Ray decides to pay Luke's widow an anonymous visit and give her some cash. Gary is in an induced coma after being bashed in a gun deal gone wrong set up by his brother-in-law, Vasilli. Vasilli's story doesn't add up and when confronted with a surprise visit by Ray, some of the truth comes out. Once Ray discovers who Gary's assailants were, he lets them know that they shouldn't mess with the people he cares about.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Gary wakes from his coma, and thanks Ray for doing "a bit of this and a bit of that" to Vassili and the guys who bashed him. Ray and Nick are becoming friends and he asks Nick for a favour. Jacinta berates Ray for telling Brittany that Jesus isn't real. The court has ordered Ray to attend anger management. His first meeting doesn't go very well. Freddy informs Ray that the guys he bashed for putting Gary in a coma belong to a crew run by his son-in-law's brother, Davros. Freddy insists Ray sits down with Davros to smooth the waters. Nick makes good on the favour. While on drugs, Vasilli breaks into Gary's house to rob the contents of his safe. Gary, who has just returned home from hospital, manages to send an SOS text to Ray who is out shopping with Ally. Ray comes to Gary's rescue and promptly deals with Vasilli - but they'll have to work out what to do with the body as Tatiana has arrived home unexpectedly.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Gary takes Ray for a drive to give him a surprise as a thank you for saving him. Ray and Ally's relationship has developed. Freddy takes Ray to meet Davros. Ray doesn't like Davros and although Davros seems placated by the end of the conference, Freddy knows better. A road-rage incident forces Ally to confront Ray about his quick access to violence, rather than attempting to diffuse a situation. When court-ordered anger management therapist Peter confronts Ray about the same impulse, Ray explains that it's justifiable to let people clearly know that there are ramifications for being an a******. For Ray, it's all about respect. Ray brings Ally home to meet Brittany. Ray can't sleep and gets up to notice a van parked outside surveilling his house. He goes for a drive and leads the van out to a safe place to do some permanent damage to it's occupants - Davros' guys - using the surprise Gary gave him.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Ray and Gary are planning to relieve a guy of his drugs and cash, and bring Nick in on the job, but a sudden turn of events scuppers their plans. After informing Freddy about his and Gary's plans going astray, Ray is picked up by Davros' slow-witted bodyguard, Bobby, and the wily hitman, Dave, who abduct Ray in his own car. Ray tells his captors about a hidden strongbox containing a great deal more cash than they're being paid to do the job. Dave devises a plan: tell Davros they ran out of gas, tell Ray that they'll let him go once the strongbox is retrieved, retrieve it, deliver Ray to Davros, and get paid twice. What could possibly go wrong? Dave and Bobby uncover the strongbox, but when they momentarily leave Ray's car unattended with Ray safely locked in the trunk, the car disappears. Dave and Bobby hot wire another car and go looking for Ray, the car, and the strongbox.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.sub-title: Your Mum's Got A Strong Box
programme.desc: We meet potheads, Scon and Lefty, and discover they are the reason for the disappearance of Ray and his car. Scon and Lefty drop off Ray's car to auto mechanic, Bernie, to be chopped for parts. Bernie is surprised to find Ray in the boot and has to dump Ray's car in a nearby forest with him still tied-up inside. Ray kicks his way out of the trunk, and shortly afterwards encounters Scon and Lefty with his phone and his strongbox. Trailing them back to Bernie's auto shop, Ray confronts the trio just as they're about to torch open his strongbox, which Ray reclaims intact. Dave and Bobby intercept Ray, and finally deliver him to Davros. As Ray prepares to be dispatched to his final resting place, Davros decides he wants in on the contents of the strongbox. Only when it's finally opened do Davros, Dave, and Bobby discover that it doesn't exactly contain what they were expecting, and are reminded that greed isn't necessarily good.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Ray's work and personal life begin to collide, and he finds himself struggling to keep both sides of his life from imploding.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Ray solves problems, but under no circumstances does he answer questions.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Ray and Ally get caught out, and good dental hygiene is as important as paying your debts.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Is there really any such thing as monsters?

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: All things must end, even Christmas.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Lady troubles, old friends, and hearts on trees.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Ray does favours, but doesn't forgive.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: An old friend takes the fall, and an associate pays for past misdeeds.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: When exiting a department store, make sure you don't leave with less than you came with.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Enemies may come and go, and so, alas, do friends.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.sub-title: There Rust, And Let Me Die
programme.desc: We live, no doubt, but does anybody really die?

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: If your mistakes lead to your death, how can you learn from them?

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: If you think the violence is not the answer, you don't understand the question.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: You can't make anybody stay but you can sure as hell make 'em go.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Curiosity rarely kills the cat but too many pharmaceuticals generally will.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: All is fair in love and war but not in business. Forgiveness may be divine but revenge is way more fun.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Don't live in the past they say, but what if it's a hell of a lot better than the present?

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: Everybody loves a road trip.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: There's a reason why the road less travelled is less travelled.

programme.title: Mr Inbetween
programme.desc: If nothing ends, what begins?

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Panic attacks drive Tony Soprano to a psychiatrist's office, but his sessions are a little edited.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: A guilt-stricken Tony tries to persuade Livia to enter a nursing home, looks for a stolen car for his son and bails Christopher out of another botched Comley hijacking.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony's friend and mob boss Jackie Aprile, is diagnosed with cancer and Christopher considers the drawbacks of providing Meadow with "safe" drugs.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony investigates Dr Melfi's background and tries to appease a volatile Uncle Junior; Anthony learns about the family business when a schoolmate backs down from a fight.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Visiting a college in Maine, Tony bonds with his daughter and spots a former mob witness; Carmela discovers Dr Melfi's gender and makes a confession to Father Phil.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Uncle Junior takes his new role as boss seriously, irritating everyone. Tony's fascination with Dr Melfi continues as he begins having erotic dreams about her. Carmela drowns her sorrows in a shopping spree.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: As Tony and Carmela struggle with AJ, who is diagnosed with attention deficit disorder, they wonder what the children know about the family business, and Tony remembers his own childhood revelations.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Federal indictments loom, worrying Tony and the family. Christopher's erratic behaviour disturbs Tony who confronts his nephew.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony and Uncle Junior learn secrets about each other, with results for both of Tony's families.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: A rap star seeks reparations from Hesh, and Tony and Carmela attempt to move into a new social circle.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: The Feds have an informant inside the family and Tony's unhappily sure he knows who it is. Livia feigns distress as Junior puts a contract out on Tony.

programme.desc: Tony's friend and mob boss Jackie Aprile, is diagnosed with cancer and Christopher considers the drawbacks of providing Meadow with "safe" drugs.

programme.title: The Sopranos

programme.title: The Sopranos

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Uncle Junior takes his new role as boss seriously, irritating everyone. Tony's fascination with Dr Melfi continues as he begins having erotic dreams about her. Carmela drowns her sorrows in a shopping spree.

programme.desc: A rap star seeks reparations from Hesh, and Tony and Carmela attempt to move into a new social circle.

programme.desc: Federal indictments loom, worrying Tony and the family. Christopher's erratic behaviour disturbs Tony who confronts his nephew.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.sub-title: Guy Walks Into A Psychiatrist's Office...
programme.desc: Big P**** returns for a tense reunion with Tony. Tony's sister Janice comes to town, and Chris takes over an internet stock scam.

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Uncle Junior is released to house arrest and uses his doctor's office to conduct business. Tony and a labour leader scheme to force jobs and money from a construction site.

programme.title: Oppenheimer
programme.desc: Oppenheimer thrusts audiences into the mind of physicist J. Robert Oppenheimer, whose landmark work on the Manhattan Project created the first atomic bomb.

programme.title: Immaculate
programme.desc: Cecilia, a woman of devout faith, is warmly welcomed to the picture-perfect Italian countryside where she is offered a new role at an illustrious convent. But it becomes clear to Cecilia that her new home harbors dark and horrifying secrets.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: He's a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

programme.title: Mean Girls (2024)
programme.desc: In a musical twist of the cult classic, new student Cady Heron is welcomed by the popular girls called "The Plastics". However, when Cady falls for queen bee Regina's ex-boyfriend, she finds herself in Regina's crosshairs. She must learn to stay true to herself while navigating the most cut throat jungle of all: high school.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrate the life and music of an icon who inspired generations through his message of love, peace, and unity. In this powerful and uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's incredible story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that changed the world.

programme.title: Gary
programme.desc: Follows Gary Coleman's rise to international fame as the child star of Diff'rent Strokes, his struggles with fame, and the controversy surrounding his tragic death at the age of 42.

programme.title: Freelance
programme.desc: An ex-special forces operative takes on a private security gig for a journalist as she interviews a ruthless dictator. When a military coup breaks out, the trio must figure out how to survive the jungle, the assassins, and each other.

programme.title: Bank of Dave
programme.desc: Based on the true-life experiences of Dave Fishwick, Bank of Dave tells the story of how a working-class Burnley man and self-made millionaire fought to set up a community bank.

programme.title: The Survival Of Kindness
programme.desc: BlackWoman is abandoned in a cage in the middle of the desert. Following her escape, she walks through pestilence and persecution, from desert to mountain to city, only to find more captivity.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible – Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: Sweethearts
programme.desc: Two college freshmen pull a "Turkey Dump" and break up with their high school sweethearts over "Drunksgiving" - the one chaotic night before Thanksgiving in their hometown that puts their co-dependent friendship to the test.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: A feared contract killer, known as "The Queen of the Dead" in Paris' criminal underworld, who refuses to murder a young blind woman on the orders of her handler, finds herself hunted by old colleagues and a determined detective.

programme.title: Apartment 7A
programme.desc: New York City, 1965. What happened in the apartment before Rosemary moved in? A struggling dancer finds herself drawn into dark forces by a peculiar couple promising her fame.

programme.title: Revival69: Concert That Rocked the World
programme.desc: When a festival is launched in 1969 to revive the Kings of Rock 'n' Roll, untold events arise during John Lennon's and The Plastic Ono Band's arrival, triggering his decision to leave the Beatles.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: As Arthur Curry confronts the responsibilities of being King of the Seven Seas, a long-buried ancient power is unleashed. After witnessing the full effect of these dark forces, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an old enemy, and embark on a treacherous journey to protect his family, his kingdom, and the world from irreversible devastation.

programme.title: Past Lives
programme.desc: Korea. Childhood friends Nora and Hae Sung are torn apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Two decades later, they reunite in New York for one fateful week as they confront notions of destiny, love, and the choices that make a life.

programme.title: Sweethearts
programme.desc: Two college freshmen pull a "Turkey Dump" and break up with their high school sweethearts over "Drunksgiving" - the one chaotic night before Thanksgiving in their hometown that puts their co-dependent friendship to the test.

programme.title: How to Make Gravy
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.title: Whale Nation
programme.desc: A humpback whale is beached on a remote shore. During the fight to save its life, we will discover the story of these extraordinary creatures, denizens of the world's oceans. Inspired by the best-selling book, and exquisitely narrated by Richard E. Grant, Whale Nation takes us on a journey of discovery into the unexplored territories and barely known society of whales, with their remarkable abilities and incredibly rich and complex social lives. A film about life in all its diversity, about human's place on Earth and the vital need for cooperation between the species that share our planet.

programme.title: David Holmes: The Boy Who Lived
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story of stuntman David Holmes, a prodigious teenage gymnast from Essex, England, who is selected to play Daniel Radcliffe's stunt double in the first Harry Potter film, when Daniel is just eleven. Over the next ten years, the two form an inextricable bond, but on the penultimate film a tragic accident on set leaves David paralyzed with a debilitating spinal injury, turning his world upside down. As Daniel and his closest stunt colleagues rally to support David and his family in their moment of need, it is David's extraordinary spirit of resilience that becomes their greatest source of strength and inspiration.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective, Danny Rourke instead finds himself spiraling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies where he will ultimately call into question his most basic assumptions about everything and everyone in his world. Aided by Diana Cruz, an unnervingly gifted psychic, Rourke simultaneously pursues and is pursued by a lethal specter, the one man he believes holds the key to finding the missing girl only to discover more than he ever bargained for.

programme.title: Kill
programme.desc: India. When army commando Amrit finds out his true love Tulika is engaged against her will, he boards a New Delhi-bound train in a daring quest to derail the arranged marriage. But when a gang of knife-wielding thieves led by the ruthless Fani begin to terrorize innocent passengers on his train, Amrit takes them on himself in a death-defying kill-spree to save those around him - turning what should have been a typical commute into an adrenaline-fueled thrill ride.

programme.title: Dracula: Voyage of the Demeter
programme.desc: Strange events befall the merchant ship Demeter, carrying private cargo - fifty unmarked wooden crates - from Carpathia to London. Stalked each night by a merciless presence onboard the ship, when the Demeter finally arrives off the shores of England, it is a charred, derelict wreck. There is no trace of the crew.

programme.title: The Exorcist: Believer
programme.desc: When a 12-year-old girl becomes possessed by a mysterious demonic entity, her father desperately searches for help.

programme.title: The Lesson
programme.desc: Liam, an aspiring writer, accepts a tutoring position at the family estate of his idol, renowned author JM Sinclair, and his wife Helene.

programme.title: The Last Rifleman
programme.desc: World War II veteran Artie Crawford lives in Northern Ireland. After his wife's death, he decides to set off alone to France to attend the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Golda
programme.desc: Set during the tense 19 days of the Yom Kippur War in 1973. Israeli Prime Minister Golda Meir is faced with the potential of Israel's complete destruction, and must navigate overwhelming odds, a skeptical cabinet, and a complex relationship with US Secretary of State Henry Kissinger. Her tough leadership and compassion would ultimately decide the fate of her nation and leave her with a controversial legacy around the world.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: Freud's Last Session
programme.desc: Freud invites iconic author C.S. Lewis to debate the existence of God, his unique relationship with his daughter, and Lewis' unconventional relationship with his best friend's mother.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: This film is based on the true story of a government leak from former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner. Saturday afternoon, June 2017, twenty-five-year old Reality Winner is confronted at her home by the FBI. A cryptic conversation begins and soon Reality's life starts to unravel.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: An exploratory dive into the depths of the ocean of a research team spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: Five Nights At Freddy's
programme.desc: After accepting a security guard job from Steve, Mike discovers an abandoned restaurant may be haunted by murderous animatronics.

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: A father witnesses his son's death in a gang's crossfire on Christmas Eve. While recovering from a wound that costs him his voice, he makes vengeance his life's mission.

programme.title: You'll Never Find Me
programme.desc: An isolated man living at the back of a desolate caravan park is visited by a desperate young woman seeking shelter from a violent storm. As the savage storm worsens, these solitary souls begin to feel threatened, but who should really be afraid?

programme.title: Lights Out
programme.desc: A homeless veteran gets caught up in the world of underground fight clubs.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she confronts the possibility of finding love and happiness in the face of mental illness.

programme.title: Monkey Man
programme.desc: Inspired by the legend of Hanuman, an icon embodying strength and courage, Monkey Man stars Patel as Kid, an anonymous young man who ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he is beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. After years of suppressed rage, Kid discovers a way to infiltrate the enclave of the city's sinister elite. As his childhood trauma boils over, his mysteriously scarred hands unleash an explosive campaign of retribution to settle the score with the men who took everything from him.

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love
programme.desc: Celebrate the life and music of an icon who inspired generations through his message of love, peace, and unity. In this powerful and uplifting film, discover Bob Marley's incredible story of overcoming adversity and the journey behind his revolutionary music that changed the world.

programme.title: The Color Purple (2023)
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband simply called Mister. With the support of sultry singer Shug Avery and stand-her-ground stepdaughter Sofia, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Oprah and the Color Purple Journey
programme.desc: In this exclusive behind-the-scenes documentary look at the anticipated new musical adaptation of The Color Purple, Academy Award-nominee Oprah Winfrey goes on location to the Georgia set to give audiences unprecedented access to the making of the new film.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on and the skills to use them, The Expendables are the world's last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table. But new team members with new styles and tactics are going to give "new blood" a new meaning.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she confronts the possibility of finding love and happiness in the face of mental illness.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Follows Morris, who must coach a misfit softball team of his fellow housemates during his mandatory stay at Sweet Dreams sober living in order to get his life back on track.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Madame Web
programme.desc: After showing signs of clairvoyance, New York City paramedic Cassandra Webb must confront revelations about her past and protect three young women from a mysterious adversary who wants them dead.

programme.title: John Farnham: Finding the Voice
programme.desc: In this first authorised biopic, we follow John Farnham's life from the quiet suburbs of Melbourne to '60s pop fame, through incredible highs and lows, and ultimately to record-breaking success as 'Australia's Voice'.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: To live in Barbie Land is to be a perfect being in a perfect place. Unless you have a full-on existential crisis. Or you're a Ken.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family from Downunder to the States, searching for a brighter future after his successful music company collapses. With nothing more than their seven children, suitcases, and their love of music, David and his pregnant wife Helen set out to rebuild their lives. David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Allelujah
programme.desc: ALLELUJAH is a warm and deeply moving story about old age. When the geriatric ward in a small Yorkshire hospital is threatened with closure, the hospital decides to fight back by galvanizing the local community: they invite a news crew to film their preparations for a concert in honor of the hospital's most distinguished nurse. What could go wrong? ALLELUJAH celebrates the spirit of the elderly patients whilst paying tribute to the deep humanity of the medical staff battling with limited resources and ever-growing demand.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The Spenglers return to the New York City firehouse where the original Ghostbusters have taken ghost-busting to the next level. When the discovery of an ancient artefact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must unite to save the world.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny Court-Martial
programme.desc: A naval officer stands trial for mutiny after taking command from a ship captain he feels is acting in an unstable way, putting in danger both the ship and its crew.

programme.title: The Great Escaper
programme.desc: Bernard Jordan, a World War II veteran, sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: The ultimate David versus Goliath story about the insane true story of everyday people who flipped the script on Wall Street and got rich by turning GameStop into the world's hottest company.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: Randy is perfectly content fading into the background. But when his co-worker Benson goes on a sudden and violent rampage leaving a trail of destruction in his wake, Randy is forced to face his fears and confront his troubled past in order to survive.

programme.title: Mercy Road
programme.desc: A flawed man commits a crime and learns how far he is willing to go to save his child.

programme.title: Something In The Water
programme.desc: A dream wedding turns into a nightmare when five girlfriends fight for their lives in open water.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: When their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a couple must spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorised by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy.

programme.title: Monkey Man
programme.desc: Inspired by the legend of Hanuman, an icon embodying strength and courage, Monkey Man stars Patel as Kid, an anonymous young man who ekes out a meager living in an underground fight club where, night after night, wearing a gorilla mask, he is beaten bloody by more popular fighters for cash. As his childhood trauma boils over, his mysteriously scarred hands unleash an explosive campaign of retribution to settle the score with the men who took everything from him.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A workaholic mother gets more than she bargained for when she hires a sought after consultant to help her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Maddie wishes for her sister Faith to experience true love for the first time. Next day, Faith finds a perfect match in Andrew. But as Christmas nears, she begins to wonder if Andrew really is the one for her.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: Once Upon a Main Street
programme.desc: Amelia, who wants to open a year-round Christmas store, bids for a shop lot against Vic, who wants to open a chocolate shop. Rivalry becomes romance when they must work together.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe plans the Christmas Fair where she meets Evan and falls in love but he goes to Norway for his dream job.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: A Christmas Wish
programme.desc: Maddie wishes for her sister Faith to experience true love for the first time. Next day, Faith finds a perfect match in Andrew. But as Christmas nears, she begins to wonder if Andrew really is the one for her.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, particularly all the money spent and alone for the holiday for the first time in decades, as their daughter has just joined the Peace Corps, grumpy Luther Krank and his sweet wife, Nora, decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations, the cards, the parties and to spend the dollars saved on a 10-day Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Feliz NaviDAD
programme.desc: David Morales, an Arizona high school principal and single dad, has lost the holiday spirit after also losing his wife a few years ago during the Christmas season. Now, David will do anything to avoid Christmas so he moonlights as a delivery driver during the holidays. But this year, David's 14 year old daughter, Noel, and his live-in sister, Marissa, are determined to bring the yuletide spirit back to the family and, with a little luck, also help David find love again via online dating. So when Sophie, a witty musician and customer on David's delivery route, swipes right on him, something magical happens between them.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two anonymous emailers fall head-over-laptops in love, unaware they are fierce rivals in the bookshop business.

programme.title: Christmas Reservations
programme.desc: It's Christmas at the Treeline Ski Resort, where Holly plans every event and keeps all the guests happy. When her college sweetheart checks in, Holly discovers she has her own reservations about life and love.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: A lonely cat living in a mall pet shop develops a sour outlook on life until, in the midst of the holiday rush, she meets a very special 12-year-old girl.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: Back in Louisiana for Christmas, Noelle Collins has big plans to resurrect the town's live nativity, a beloved tradition that her late mother used to put on. Things become complicated, however, when Noelle runs into her high school sweetheart, Nick Russell, a rising baseball star also back home due to a recent injury. Still feeling the burn from their senior year break-up, their lives are pushed together even further when they learn their parents share an attraction and want to be more than just friends. When things begin to fall apart with the live nativity Nick and Noelle reluctantly team up to pull off the show and find themselves growing close, uncovering a hometown love for each other and the joy of Christmas that both never really faded away.

programme.title: Holiday in your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with the decision of leaving Nashville to be by her grandmother's bedside or to perform in the concert before returning home. Her musical inspiration, Faith Shawn, helps her to realize the importance of family.

programme.title: Feliz NaviDAD
programme.desc: David Morales, an Arizona high school principal and single dad, has lost the holiday spirit after also losing his wife a few years ago during the Christmas season. Now, David will do anything to avoid Christmas so he moonlights as a delivery driver during the holidays. But this year, David's 14 year old daughter, Noel, and his live-in sister, Marissa, are determined to bring the yuletide spirit back to the family and, with a little luck, also help David find love again via online dating. So when Sophie, a witty musician and customer on David's delivery route, swipes right on him, something magical happens between them.

programme.title: The Night Before Christmas
programme.desc: An estranged mother and daughter are caught in a snowstorm on Christmas Eve and are forced to take refuge inside a church. They meet a handsome pastor and a music teacher who motivate them to reconnect.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly introduces her boyfriend to her parents, Mr and Mrs Claus. Will Conner be ready to take their relationship to the next level when it means he's next in line to be Santa?

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Love's causing chaos all over London. Even the PM is smitten. Ten separate stories intertwine in a Christmas Eve climax.

programme.title: Christmas Hotel
programme.desc: Erin grew up in the small town of Mt Holly but always dreamt of living in a big city. Her first job - working the desk at the Mt Holly Inn - started her on a path to New York where she now works at the prestigious Windsor Hotel. When her boss tells her she will receive a promotion if she can pull off a big project, she is thrilled - until she realises the project is in her hometown. Erin returns home to discover that the locals don't appreciate their precious Mt. Holly Inn being bought out by a big corporation. And heading up the charge? Erin's ex-boyfriend Conner. But when several hotel staff members come down with the flu, Erin is forced to enlist Conner's help with hotel's Christmas events. As they two re-establish their relationship, Erin has to figure out if what she really wants is a promotion or to be home again.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: The Christmas Pact
programme.desc: Can best friends fall in love? That's the question next door neighbours Sadie and Ben will answer as they keep the spirit of Christmas and the magic of their childhood pact alive! When they were eight years old, they planted a scrawny 3-foot tall Christmas tree behind their church and the Christmas Pact began. But as life gets in the way the pact is threatened to be broken. Ben and Sadie need some Christmas Magic to recommit to each other and promise to keep their special holiday traditions. With each Christmas that passes by, Ben and Sadie's Christmas tree grows taller and stronger; and so does their love. The pact bearing fruit to the magic of Christmas and the undeniable answer. Yes, friends can fall in love! love!

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery
programme.desc: 100 years ago, a strip of Santa's magical jingle bells were discovered by a young boy in Pleasant Bay, Oregon, bringing about a century of prosperity and peace for the small town. Now, just days before Christmas, the bells are missing, and it's up to a group of intrepid kids to solve the case, find the bells and restore the Christmas magic.

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a doubting boy boards a magical train that's headed to the North Pole and Santa Claus's home.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. Raised by Papa Elf, Buddy comes to realise he doesn't fit in with the other elves. Determined to find a place where he belongs, Buddy searches for his real dad in New York City. In the Big Apple, Buddy finds out why his dad is on the naughty list. But most importantly, he sees that the world is seriously lacking in Christmas spirit, which causes Santa all kinds of problems. So with the help of a beautiful department store elf, Buddy tries to teach his dad and the world the true meaning of Christmas spirit and to prove to everyone that Santa really exists.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her home town, where she is joined by her boyfriend and learns that he is the crown prince of Madelvia.

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery
programme.desc: 100 years ago, a strip of Santa's magical jingle bells were discovered by a young boy in Pleasant Bay, Oregon, bringing about a century of prosperity and peace for the small town. Now, just days before Christmas, the bells are missing, and it's up to a group of intrepid kids to solve the case, find the bells and restore the Christmas magic.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Christmess
programme.desc: A once famous actor is now performing as Santa Claus in a mall because of his alcohol addiction. After meeting his estranged daughter he seeks help, in order to win her forgiveness.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica, a young, up-and-coming film-maker in Hollywood, has made a name for herself directing Christmas movies. When handsome network executive Christopher shows up threatening to halt production on her latest movie, Jessica's assistant, Reena, points out the irony: Jessica isn't just trying to save her Christmas movie, she's actually living in one. Jessica must now juggle all the classic tropes - her actors falling in and out of love, a wayward elf dog, and her own stirring romantic feelings for her perceived nemesis - in order to get her movie and her life to their happy endings.

programme.title: Holiday in your Heart
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old LeAnn Rimes wants nothing more than to sing at the Grand Ole Opry. She is invited to sing at a Christmas concert on Nashville's famous stage, but upon her arrival, she is faced with the decision of leaving Nashville to be by her grandmother's bedside or to perform in the concert before returning home. Her musical inspiration, Faith Shawn, helps her to realize the importance of family.

Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: A Savage Christmas
programme.desc: After years of estrangement, transwoman Davina Savage returns for Christmas. Expecting her transition to be the focus, it's overshadowed by family secrets which threaten another Christmas lunch.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: Having finally gotten used to each other's existence, Brad and Dusty must now deal with their intrusive fathers during the holidays.

programme.title: Christmas In Wonderland
programme.desc: When two kids find a hoard of cash, it looks like Christmas has come early - until the crooks who counterfeited the money go after them.

programme.title: Dora's Christmas Carol Adventure
programme.desc: Santa has warned Swiper again and again. If he keeps swiping on Christmas, he'll be permanently put on the naughty list. Will the Christmas tree star and party be ruined?

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: While uncovering who is behind the random acts of Christmas popping up around her city, a journalist meets a competing reporter who captures her heart.

programme.title: A Hollywood Christmas
programme.desc: Jessica, a young, up-and-coming film-maker in Hollywood, has made a name for herself directing Christmas movies. When handsome network executive Christopher shows up threatening to halt production on her latest movie, Jessica's assistant, Reena, points out the irony: Jessica isn't just trying to save her Christmas movie, she's actually living in one. Jessica must now juggle all the classic tropes - her actors falling in and out of love, a wayward elf dog, and her own stirring romantic feelings for her perceived nemesis - in order to get her movie and her life to their happy endings.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a busy journalist and singleton lost amid a sea of smug-marrieds in London. After vowing to abandon her many vices, Bridget turns over a new page by channelling her opinions and insecurities in a journal that becomes a hilarious chronicle of her misadventures. Soon, Bridget finds herself stuck in the sights of not one, but two men: her dashing boss Daniel, who thrives on bad behaviour; and the brooding Mark, who she despises but somehow can't get away from.

programme.title: Wishin' and Hopin'
programme.desc: In 1964 Connecticut, 10 year old Felix's holiday season is spiced up by the sudden arrivals of a substitute teacher and a feisty Russian student. Based on the bestseller by Wally Lamb.

programme.title: Elf
programme.desc: Once upon a Christmas Eve, an orphan baby crawled into Santa's bag of gifts and was taken to the North Pole. programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of Australian music legend Paul Kelly's classic song, 'How to Make Gravy'.

programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Happiest Season
programme.desc: Meeting your girlfriend's family for the first time can be tough. When Abby learns that Harper has kept their relationship a secret from her family, she begins to question the girlfriend she thought she knew.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: For their eighth fully animated feature, Illumination and Universal Pictures present "The Grinch", based on Dr Seuss' beloved holiday classic. The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit. Funny, heartwarming and visually stunning, it's a universal story about the spirit of Christmas and the indomitable power of optimism.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: There's a traitor in the heart of America's most secret spy network, the Impossible Mission Force. He or she is trying to steal IMF's critical agent list which would give America's enemies the names of every covert operative in the world. When a mission goes badly wrong, agent Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is suspected of being the turncoat and becomes a hunted man. With all the might of IMF now turned against him, Hunt must flush out the real traitor - even if that means stealing the secret list himself.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Special Agent Ethan Hunt teams up with the villain's ex-girlfriend to destroy an international conspiracy to sell a deadly virus to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt must bring down a ruthless villain and rescue his fiancee.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF disbanded, and Ethan out in the cold, the team now faces off against a network of highly skilled special agents, the Syndicate. These highly-trained operatives are hell-bent on creating a new world order through an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with disavowed British agent Ilsa Faust, who may or may not be a member of this rogue nation, as the group faces their most impossible mission yet.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Tom Cruise: An Eternal Youth
programme.desc: After a career spanning 40 years, Tom Cruise does not seem to have developed one wrinkle. His legendary smile has dominated many blockbuster productions. This film will try to unveil the man behind the film icon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Based on the incredible true story of Barry Seal, a drug-smuggling pilot in the 1980s who was recruited by the CIA to carry out one of the largest covert operations in history.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed deep beneath the desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened in our current day. Her malevolence has grown over millennia and with it come terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: An idealistic young American proudly enlists during the Vietnam War and returns home a quadriplegic. Struggling to overcome drug addiction and depression, he turns his life around and becomes an outspoken critic of the war. Based on the true story of Ron Kovic.

programme.title: Tom Cruise: An Eternal Youth
programme.desc: After a career spanning 40 years, Tom Cruise does not seem to have developed one wrinkle. His legendary smile has dominated many blockbuster productions. This film will try to unveil the man behind the film icon.

programme.title: Eyes Wide Shut
programme.desc: A doctor plunges into an erotic foray that threatens his marriage, and may ensnare him in a murder mystery, after his wife's admission of sexual longings. The story sweeps from doubt and fear to self-discovery and reconciliation.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: The Pirates! Band of Misfits
programme.desc: Set sail for a fun-filled voyage and hilarious pirate antics with the biggest band of misfits on the seven seas. When the infamous Pirate Captain is shunned once again by his rivals Black Bellamy and Cutlass Liz, he sets his sights to win the coveted Pirate of the Year Award. With his trusted dodo, Polly, and ragtag crew at his side, the Pirate Captain will need to battle a diabolical queen, save a young scientist and never lose sight of what a pirate loves best: adventure.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Join the fun when the Little family adopts an adorably spunky boy named Stuart, who looks a lot like a mouse. Mr and Mrs Little fall in love with Stuart right away, but their older son, George, isn't so sure. As Stuart tries to win over his new brother with hilarious feats of courage and daring, the family's cat, Snowbell, gets involved with a gang of shady felines who devise a dastardly plan to get Stuart out of the house - permanently.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: A worker ant changes roles with a soldier ant to woo a forbidden princess.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A street kid caught vandalising an aquarium bonds with a mighty killer whale while cleaning up his graffiti. When he learns that the orca is worth more dead than alive, he risks everything to free it.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When Oh, a loveable misfit from another planet, lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own people, he forms an unlikely friendship with an adventurous girl named Tip who is on a quest of her own. Through a series of comic adventures with Tip, Oh comes to understand that being different and making mistakes is all part of being human. And while he changes her planet and she changes his world, they discover the true meaning of the word home.

programme.title: Trolls Band Together
programme.desc: Join Poppy and Branch on their latest adventure as they embark on an epic journey that lead to Branch's reunion with his BroZone brothers, and Poppy's long-lost sister, Viva.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee
programme.desc: Move over, Mary Poppins. Nanny McPhee is a wonderfully hideous, mysterious nanny hired to tame seven brats with a feckless father.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee appears at the door of a stressed young mother, who is trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war. But once she's arrived, Nanny McPhee discovers that the children are fighting a war of their own against two spoiled city cousins who have just moved in and refuse to leave.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween follows the Quinn family - high school senior Sarah, her middle school brother Sony, and their mother Kathy into an entirely new set of spooky, exciting, and funny events. Sonny and schoolmate Sam are best friends with a side job as the "Junk Brothers," collecting discarded stuff other people don't want. But it's a gig that unfortunately leads them right into the path of (gulp) Slappy, the mischievous ventriloquist dummy from an unpublished Goosebumps book.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: Dive into adventure in the sun-drenched Florida Keys with this action-packed family favourite. When Sandy Ricks is sent to Coral Key to stay with his salty Uncle Porter for the summer, he never dreamed he would become best mates with a feisty, orphaned dolphin named Flipper. In no time, the two new friends become caught up in a series of high-seas escapades and Sandy discovers a whole new outlook on life in this heart-warming adventure.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with a family voyage on a luxury monster cruise ship so he can take a summer vacation from providing everyone else's vacation at the hotel, and the rest of Drac's Pack cannot resist tagging along. The monsters are all having a great time, indulging in all of the shipboard fun the cruise has to offer, from monster volleyball to colossus sized buffets and exotic excursions, but then the unexpected happens as Drac falls for the intriguing-yet-dangerous captain of the ship. Balancing family, friends, and a budding romance might just be too much, even for the most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: He knows no fear. He knows no danger. He knows nothing! When the priceless Crown Jewels are stolen, bumbling Johnny English is the only secret agent in the country who can solve the crime. His prime suspects: a sinister businessman and a beautiful woman with a mysterious interest in Johnny's top-secret mission. Can the clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: The accidental secret agent returns, sent on a mission to stop a group of international assassins before they eliminate a Chinese leader and cause global chaos.

programme.title: Oink
programme.desc: A nine-year-old girl gets a pig named Oink as a gift from her grandfather.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: In this hilarious animated adventure comedy, you'll finally find out why the birds are so angry. In an island paradise populated entirely by happy, flightless birds - or almost entirely, Red, a bird with a temper problem, speedy Chuck, and the volatile Bomb have always been outsiders. But when the island is visited by mysterious green piggies, it's up to these unlikely outcasts to figure out what the pigs are up to.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean is a London museum guard sent to Los Angeles in charge of a priceless painting. Mayhem erupts when the famously eccentric simpleton is mistaken for an art expert.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Morty and other zoo animals find a way to escape from Madagascar when the penguins reassemble a wrecked airplane. The precariously repaired craft stays airborne just long enough to make it to the African continent. There the New Yorkers encounter members of their own species for the first time. Africa proves to be a wild place, but Alex and company wonder if it is better than their Central Park home.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: This family drama follows Chrissa Maxwell, who moves with her parents to snowy Minnesota, where she has to start at a new school mid-year, but is worried she won't fit in and will have trouble making new friends. On her very first day, Chrissa is seated with three girls who greet her with teasing and tricks. The 'Mean Bees' bully Chrissa and the other kids in class, on the bus, online, and even at swim club. Chrissa can't seem to make any new friends, not even with the girl who seems to need a friend the most. When the biggest bully becomes Chrissa's swimming rival, the taunting finally goes too far. Can Chrissa find a way to stand strong and stop the bullying?

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: A legendary rivalry re-emerges when Jerry moves into New York City's finest hotel on the eve of the wedding of the century, forcing the desperate event planner to hire Tom to get rid of him. As mayhem ensues, the escalating cat-and-mouse battle soon threatens to destroy her career, the wedding, and possibly the hotel itself.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy and Jeff Garlin put their parenting skills to the test in this hilarious caper about two sacked admen and newly stay-at-home dads who open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Fred Claus
programme.desc: This is a story you've never heard before, a hilarious and heart warming comedy about Fred Claus, Santa's brother - and complete opposite. After growing up in saintly Nick's shadow, Fred becomes a grouch who's lost his belief in Christmas. Then, one magical December, Fred flies north (first class via reindeer) to find brother Nick is in trouble: a scheming efficiency expert is out to shut down Christmas forever! Expect fun by the sleighful as Fred helps save Christmas and rediscovers the gift of family.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: TMNT: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. They take on a crime syndicate, but soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: A projectionist allows 11-year-old boy Danny to a private midnight preview of the latest movie featuring his idol and superhero, Jack Slater. A magic ticket transports the boy into the film, where he helps his hero chase the baddie, who in turn breaks through the screen to wreak havoc in real-life, with the help of an evil sidekick.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: The flightless angry birds and the scheming green piggies take their beef to the next level in The Angry Birds Movie 2! When a new threat emerges that puts both Bird and Pig Island in danger, Red, Chuck, Bomb, and Mighty Eagle recruit Chuck's sister Silver and team up with pigs Leonard, his assistant Courtney, and techpig Garry to forge an unsteady truce and form an unlikely super-team to save their homes.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' the Lorax
programme.desc: Dr. Seuss' The Lorax is an adaptation of Dr. Seuss' classic tale of a forest creature who shares the enduring power of hope. In the walled city of Thneed-Ville, where everything is artificial and even the air is a commodity, a boy named Ted hopes to win the heart of his dream girl, Audrey. When he learns of her wish to see a real tree, Ted seeks out the Once-ler, a ruined old businessman outside of town in a stark wasteland. Upon hearing of how the hermit gave into his greed for profits and devastated the land over the protests of the Lorax, Ted is inspired to undo the disaster. However, the greedy Mayor of Thneed-Ville, Aloysius O'Hare, has made his fortune exploiting the environmental collapse and is determined to stop the boy from undermining his business.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: St Trinian's
programme.desc: The hilarious antics and girl-power action return as the 'young ladies' of the infamous school St Trinian's face its closure once more as dire financial problems set in. Headmistress Camilla Fritton is threatened, not only by the bank but her unorthodox doctrine of free expression and self-empowerment has drawn the attention of education minister Geoffrey Thwaites. Even though he's an old flame of Camilla's, right now he's determined to bring discipline and order to the anarchic school. However those smart and fearless St Trinian's girls are determined to defend the school they love to the end.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are fourth-grade BFFs who love dreaming up funny pranks. One day, they accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's a dimwitted hero named Captain Underpants. But when the new schoolteacher turns out to be a disgraced scientist bent on ridding the world of laughter, George, Harold and Captain Underpants must band together to stop his evil agenda.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey 2
programme.desc: Little sparrow Richard meets a flock of sparrows who are being held captive by the peacock Zamano. To regain their freedom, they have to go on a great adventure together and find a mysterious treasure.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure in the all-star adventure, The Road to El Dorado! Upon landing on the shores of El Dorado, the legendary Lost City of Gold, Tulio and Miguel are mistaken for gods and are lavished with riches beyond their wildest dreams! As friendship, loyalty, and greed collide, our unlikely heroes must make the decision of their lives: run off with the gold or face unforeseen dangers to save the people of El Dorado.

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie
programme.desc: Dive into the undersea sensation! After King Neptune's crown is stolen and Mr Krabs is accused of the crime, SpongeBob and Patrick set out on a danger-ridden, hilarity-filled adventure to retrieve the crown and save Mr Krabs.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Peter Banning is a 40-year-old corporate takeover lawyer who has lost any memory of being Peter Pan. Peter and his family travel to London to visit Granny Wendy. Peter discovers a note from Captain Hook informing Peter that he has kidnapped his children. With the encouragement of Tinkerbell, Peter once again takes wing, and it's off to Neverland to rescue his kids.

programme.title: PAW PATROL: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: A meteor crash gives the PAW Patrol pups superpowers, transforming them into the Mighty Pups. But things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger breaks out of jail to steal their superpowers.

programme.title: The Addams Family (1991)
programme.desc: A swindler claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester tries to steal a fortune from the kooky and spooky Addams family.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Young Alan Parrish sits down as a young boy to play a game with his friend, Sarah, and on a roll of the dice is mysteriously transported into the strange jungle realm of Jumanji. There he remains trapped for 26 years, until two newly orphaned children, Judy and Peter, playing in the attic of Alan's childhood home, free the now-adult Alan from the game's clutches. But to defeat Jumanji's encroaching powers, the three reluctant players must find the now-grown Sarah and band together as a makeshift family to finish the game - before it finishes them.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
