Amelia Donaghy is a feisty, street-smart policewoman, who together with Lincoln, must go inside the mind of this terrifying madman and defeat him at his own game.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: Mattie Ross is determined to avenge her father's blood by capturing Tom Chaney, the man who shot and killed him for two pieces of gold. Just 14, she enlists the help of Rooster Cogburn, a one-eyed, trigger-happy US Marshal with an affinity for drinking, and hardened Texas Ranger LaBoeuf to track the fleeing Chaney. Despite their differences, their ruthless determination leads them on a perilous adventure that can only have one outcome: retribution.

programme.title: Witness Protection
programme.desc: A mobster and his family enter the Witness Protection Programme after they give evidence for the state to avoid a lengthy prison sentence.

programme.title: Let Him Go
programme.desc: After losing their son, retired sheriff George Blackledge and his wife Margaret set out to save their young grandson from a dangerous family that don't intend to let the boy go.

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: Howard Hughes was a wily industrialist, glamorous movie producer and unstoppable American innovator - but thought of himself first and foremost as an aviator. This spectacular epic focuses on the most prolific period in the life of Hughes: the mid-1920s through the 1940s. It was a time of brilliant aeronautical invention, turbulent love affairs and savage corporate battles. Prepare yourself for the ride of a visionary lifetime.

programme.title: A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: The true story of a real-life friendship between beloved neighbour Fred Rogers and journalist Tom Junod.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: The inspiring true story of how Nelson Mandela joined forces with the captain of South Africa's rugby team, Francois Pienaar, to help unite their country.

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: Meet Jack Foley, the most successful bank robber in the country. On the day he busts out of jail, he finds himself stealing something far more precious than money Karen Siscos heart. She's smart. She's sexy. And unfortunately for Jack, she's a Federal Marshall. Now, they're willing to risk it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Icebox
programme.desc: Oscar, a 12-year-old Honduran boy, is forced to flee his home and seek asylum in the United States, only to find himself trapped in the U.S. immigration system. As Oscar attempts to reach his uncle, Manuel, in Arizona, he is apprehended by Border Patrol and placed in "the icebox", a processing centre for Hispanic migrant children. Faced against a seemingly impenetrable immigration system, Oscar struggles to navigate a path to freedom, with a journalist and his uncle, himself a recent immigrant, as his only lifeline.

programme.title: Angel Rodriguez
programme.desc: An important day in two peoples lives. While both at a crossroad in their lives, a school advisor helps out a troubled teenager, Angel, which steals and quarrels with her family to get attention.

programme.title: Blow
programme.desc: George Jung is the son of Fred, a struggling small business owner. Seeing his family struggle to make ends meet and failing, George vows never to share a similar fate. Moving to California with his friend, Tuna, he finds success by selling marijuana in the 1960s, but ends up in prison for it. He then becomes extremely rich by working with Pablo Escabar by importing cocaine into America, but trouble escalates when the FBI are in pursuit.

programme.title: Se7en
programme.desc: Two cops track a brilliant and elusive killer who orchestrates a string of horrific murders, each kill targeting a practitioner of one of the seven deadly sins.

programme.title: The Dry
programme.desc: Federal Agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town to attend the tragic funeral of his childhood friend. But his return opens a decades-old wound.

programme.title: Fear and Loathing in Las Vegas
programme.desc: When a writing assignment lands journalist Raoul Duke and sidekick Dr Gonzo in Las Vegas, they decide to make it the ultimate business trip. But before long, business is forgotten and trip has become the key word. Fuelled by a suitcase full of mind-bending pharmaceuticals, Duke and Gonzo set off on a fast and furious ride through non stop neon, surreal surroundings and a crew of the craziest characters. But no matter where misadventure leads them, Duke and Gonzo discover that sometimes going too far is the only way to go.

programme.title: Pariah
programme.desc: At home, 17 year old Alike (Adepero Oduye) is a sweet and soft-spoken girl who tries to follow the wishes of her straight-laced mother (Kim Wayans). However, there's another side of her that her parents don't know about. Alike is a lesbian, and with her best friend Laura (Pernell Walker) she slips out to downtown dance clubs where she feels free to be open about her sexuality, though she's still working up the courage to act on her desires. As she becomes more mature, Alike is torn between living the sheltered life her parents want for her, the club hopping lifestyle Laura has already embraced, or something that lies in between, like her neighbour Bina (Aasha Davis). Pariah was the first feature film from writer and director Dee Rees, who adapted the story from her award-winning short film of the same name.

programme.title: Hereafter
programme.desc: George is a blue-collar American who has a special connection to the afterlife. On the other side of the world, Marie, a French journalist, has a near-death experience that shakes her reality. When Marcus, a London schoolboy, loses the person closest to him, he desperately needs answers. Each on a path in search of the truth, their lives will intersect, forever changed by what they believe might - or must - exist in the Hereafter.

programme.title: Game Change
programme.desc: A searing, behind-the-scenes look at John McCain's 2008 presidential campaign, from the decision to select Alaska Governor Sarah Palin as McCain's running mate to the ticket's ultimate defeat in the general election just sixty days later. Told primarily through the eyes of senior McCain strategist Steve Schmidt, who originally championed Palin and later came to regret the choice, Game Change pulls back the curtain on the intense human drama surrounding the McCain team, the critical decisions made behind closed doors and how the choice was made to bring Palin on the ticket.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: The payoff is excitement when two-time Academy Award winner Mel Gibson portrays hard-boiled Porter in this fast, funny and twisted blend of action and noir atmosphere. When Porter's criminal heist partners rip off his $70,000 share and leave him for dead, there's only one way he'll settle things: his way.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: A multi-layered examination of the 2009 hijacking of the US container ship Maersk Alabama by a crew of Somali pirates. The film focuses on the relationship between the Alabama's commanding officer, Captain Richard Phillips, and the Somali pirate captain, Muse, who takes him hostage. Phillips and Muse are set on an unstoppable collision course when Muse and his crew target Phillips' unarmed ship; in the ensuing standoff, 145 miles off the Somali coast, both men will find themselves at the mercy of forces beyond their control.

programme.title: The Mule
programme.desc: Earl, a broke man in his 80s, is offered a job that simply requires him to drive. Unbeknownst to Earl, he's just signed on as a drug courier for a Mexican cartel.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Mel Gibson first made his mark on movie history as heroic loner Max, who drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other scraggly defenders of a fuel-depot encampment are the bizarre warriors commanded by The Humungus, notorious for never taking prisoners when they can pulverize them instead. With The Road Warrior on your side, screen action doesn't get any better.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and his crew must deal with Mr Spock's long-lost half-brother who hijacks the Enterprise for an obsessive search for god at the centre of the galaxy.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: A magical sword, a notorious assassin, a nobleman's daughter, a breathtaking quest: it adds up to the top foreign language film of all time.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Animal House
programme.desc: This raunchy, screwball comedy offers a relentless spoof of 1960s college life by following the hilarious adventures of the Delta fraternity.

programme.title: The Big Lebowski
programme.desc: The Dude, Jeff Lebowski is unemployed and laid-back until victim of mistaken identity, two thugs break into his apartment in the errant belief that they are accosting Jeff Lebowski the pasadena millionare. In the hope of getting a replacement for his soiled carpet Dude visits his wealthy namesake and, with buddy, ex 'nam' veteran, Walter, he is swept into a consequence comedy/thriller of extortion, embezzlement, sex & dope.

programme.title: Against the Wall
programme.desc: A guard is caught up in a prison riot fuelled by bad prison management.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Based on a Stephen King novel, Cujo is a happy St. Bernard until he is bitten on the nose by a rabid bat and slowly begins manifesting the symptoms of his fatal illness. His condition deteriorates as he attacks people again and again, until finally, mum Donna Trenton and her son Tad are trapped inside the family car with Cujo lurking nearby, set to kill them any way he can. A showdown is inevitable.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: With the title track sung by the Ramones fright meister Stephen King directs this chilling tale about a magical Indian burial ground. When his three-year-old son is killed on the road outside his home, Dr Louis Creed begins to think about the stories surrounding the ancient cemetery and how those buried there can be resurrected.

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Karen Blixen establishes a plantation in Africa. Meeting her true love, Denys, allows her to rethink her priorities in the midst of this vast land.

programme.title: Close Encounters of the Third Kind
programme.desc: Power company repairman Roy Neary witnesses unidentified flying objects in the skies near his Muncie, Indiana home. The encounter sets into action a startling chain of dramatic events. Trying desperately to understand what he has seen, Neary is increasingly driven to the emotional edge by the governmental cover up that's blocking him. With his wife struggling in vain to understand what is happening as their relationship disintegrates, Neary finds an ally in Jillian Guiler, a woman who has also witnessed nocturnal encounters and whose young son has been abducted by the alien visitors. As Roy and Jillian look for an answer to the extraordinary mystery that has engulfed them, an international team of scientists led by Claude Lacombe, a dedicated French expert on extraordinary phenomena, also pursues the truth. As Lacombe and company seek to understand the phenomenon of the skies and look for a communications break-through, their cosmic detective work reaches from the Indiana plains across the world to a remote hillside in India and then to the one place that holds the answer in an ultimate close encounter.

programme.title: Beetlejuice
programme.desc: What's a couple of stay-at-home ghosts to do when their beloved home is taken over by trendy yuppies? They call on Beetlejuice, the afterlife's freelance bio-exorcist to scare off the family - and everyone gets more than she, he or it bargains for!

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A veteran cop gets a suicidal partner. They have one thing in common: they hate working in pairs. But if these two can stand each other, the bad guys don't stand a chance.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: An idealistic young American proudly enlists during the Vietnam War and returns home a quadriplegic. Struggling to overcome drug addiction and depression, he turns his life around and becomes an outspoken critic of the war. Based on the true story of Ron Kovic.

programme.title: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Two retired, down-on-their-luck outlaws pick up their guns one last time to collect a bounty offered by the vengeful prostitutes of the remote Wyoming town of Big Whiskey. English Bob is an ill-fated interloper, a colourful killer-for-hire. There is also the sly and brutal local sheriff, whose brand of law enforcement ranges from unconventional to ruthless. Big trouble is coming to Big Whiskey.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire
programme.desc: A full-blooded insight into the centuries-old relationship between a regal vampire and his immortal victim, told through an interview with a journalist.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Mel Gibson first made his mark on movie history as heroic loner Max, who drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other scraggly defenders of a fuel-depot encampment are the bizarre warriors commanded by The Humungus, notorious for never taking prisoners when they can pulverize them instead. With The Road Warrior on your side, screen action doesn't get any better.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: Two drugged-out bike riders and a spaced-out lawyer go on an odyssey in search of the real America only to find violence and bigotry.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: While caddying at a snooty country club, ambitious young Danny goes for a college scholarship. But first he has to impress elitist Judge Smails and win the big golf tournament. Meanwhile, a crude construction tycoon goes to extremes to be accepted into the exclusive club, and a psychotic groundskeeper stalks a rampaging gopher.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists lose their research grant and decide to open their own business, Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment. What they discover is that all Manhattan is being besieged by otherworldly demons.

programme.title: Angela's Ashes
programme.desc: Life in impoverished Depression-era Ireland holds little promise for young Frank McCourt, the oldest son in a tight-knit family. Living by his wits, cheered by his irrepressible spirit, and sustained by his mother's fierce love, Frank embarks on an inspiring journey to overcome the poverty of his childhood and reach the land of his dreams: America.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Douglas Quaid/Hauser is haunted each night by a dream that he is on Mars looking for beautiful Melina. He goes against his wife Lori's wishes and visits the Recall laboratories. They claim that they can help make his dream a reality by offering him an adventurous trip in his mind with a powerful hallucinogenic drug. But the experience has unexpected consequences, the drug awakens a memory that was erased from Quaid's mind. In fact he is not Quaid, he is a dangerous terrorist fighting against a Martian despot, Lori is not his wife she is an enemy agent and the red planet is at the heart of a terrifying plot. Pitiless killers relentlessly chase Quaid and he goes to Mars where other memories and other dangers await him, including Melina, the woman of his dreams and he makes an incredible discovery about his own identity.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When T.E. Lawrence was attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspired the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: The Enforcer
programme.desc: Macho cop 'Dirty Harry' Callahan grudgingly takes on a female partner. San Francisco's mayor has been kidnapped and it's only a matter of time until the fatal showdown.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Eccentric scientist John Hammond plans to open a theme park consisting of live dinosaurs, genetically engineered from DNA. Archaeologists Alan Grant and Ellie Sattler are invited to view the park, only to find themselves being hunted when the dinosaurs break free.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher knows little about family. Less about football. What the homeless teen knows are the streets and projects of Memphis. Well-to-do Leigh Anne Tuohy knows little about his world. Yet when she and Michael meet, he's found a home. And the Tuohys have found something just as life-changing, a beloved new son and brother. This real-life story of family and of Michael's growth into a blue-chip football star will have you cheering with its mix of gridiron action and heartwarming emotion. Share the remarkable journey of the college all-American and first-round NFL draft pick who was a winner before he ever stepped onto the playing field.

programme.title: The World According to Garp
programme.desc: This story chronicles the life of T. S. Garp, the illegitimate son of a feminist mother, who is a quirky everyman, a wistful writer wrestling with our screw loose modern age.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: Half-brothers Doughboy and Ricky Baker are foils for each other's personality, presenting very different approaches to the tough lives they face. Ricky is the 'All-American' athlete, looking to win a football scholarship to USC and seeks salvation through sports, while 'Dough' succumbs to the violence, alcohol, and crime surrounding him in his environment, but maintains a strong sense of pride and code of honour. Between these two is their friend Tre, who is lucky to have a father, 'Furious' Styles, to teach him to have the strength of character to do what is right and to always take responsibility for his actions.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: Michael Dorsey is a talented actor, but his demanding nature and stubborn temperament have antagonised every producer in New York. Now his agent insists no one will hire him. But Michael needs money, eight thousand dollars to be exact, and to earn it, he's willing to play the role of a lifetime. This out-of-work actor finds success, love and frustration when he gets the role of his life playing a woman.

programme.title: Xanadu
programme.desc: A look at the future and a loving remembrance of the way things were in the heyday of Hollywood.

programme.title: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Celebrate good friends as they reunite for the funeral of a college pal. During the weekend that follows, these friends compare their '60s ideas with the harsh reality of their lives in the '80s, and discover that in a cold world, you need your friends to keep you warm.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Following a mysterious treasure map into a spectacular underground realm of twisting passages, outrageous booby-traps and a long-lost pirate ship full of golden doubloons, the kids race to stay one step ahead of a family of bumbling bad guys and a mild mannered monster with a face only a mother could love.

programme.title: Batman & Robin
programme.desc: Cryogenic scientist gone wrong, Mr Freeze wants to turn Gotham City into a frozen wasteland. Poison Ivy has revenge on her mind after a toxic run-in with a Wayne Enterprises scientist. While she has designs on Mr Freeze, his cold heart is consumed only by his demented plans. With the addition of Batgirl, the dynamic duo becomes a trio. Will Gotham survive?

programme.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: This 3rd instalment in the Enterprise Saga takes up after Spock's demise in The Wrath of Khan. After discovering that Spock lives on in the addled mind of none other than his old sparring partner, Bones McCoy, Capt. Kirk and crew "borrow" the junk-heaped Enterprise and defy Federation law in order to recover Spock's body from the off-limits planet, Genesis.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Now
programme.desc: The holidays are approaching and the Ubriacco household is wrapped up in more turmoil than tinsel. James has unexpectedly found prosperity and job satisfaction as a highly paid private pilot for Samantha D'Bonne, the glamorous president of an international cosmetics firm. But while her husband is winging around the world, Mollie has to juggle her role as mum with her duties at her new job, labouring as an elf for a department store Santa.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: A story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor. Two wealthy power players set the wheels turning with a crazy bet and the comedy gets richer by the minute.

programme.title: Every Which Way But Loose
programme.desc: Philo Beddoe likes beer, brawling and country music. When he falls for a sexy singer, he sets out to win her with Clyde his orangutan in tow.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: Private Benjamin
programme.desc: An upper-class socialite, disappointed with life, impulsively joins the army. After a disastrous initiation, she finds direction and self-esteem for the first time.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Captain Jean-Luc Picard leads the crew of the newly commissioned Enterprise in a battle against the Borg, an insidious race of half-machine, half-organic aliens, to restore the rightful future of Earth. Whilst on a routine patrol, Picard gets word from Starfleet Headquarters that the Borg have entered Federation Space and are on a direct course for Earth. Violating direct orders not to get involved, Picard leads a massive assault against their deadliest foe.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Drop Dead Fred
programme.desc: Every kid has an imaginary friend. Only Elizabeth isnt a kid and Drop Dead Fred is anything but imaginary. With a haircut this bad, he has to be real - and his mischief has Elizabeth in big trouble. When she splits with her husband, Elizabeth turns to her best friend. But it's her mum who sends her back home where she discovers her childhood friend, Fred. Having been locked in a box for 21 years, Fred is bursting with energy to turn Elizabeth's life into a rowdy, rollicking, racy adventure.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A hilarious, subversive and wickedly scary film about Gizmo the mogwai, a cuddly critter that multiplies with savage consequences. Great special effects and amazingly realistic mechanical creatures.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: During WWII, a man persuaded to live on an isolated island and spot aircraft finds himself responsible for a teacher and several students, all female.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking
programme.desc: A single mother searches for a suitable man to become the father of her precocious baby.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces. Unaccustomed to suburban life, fun-loving Uncle Buck soon charms his younger relatives Miles and Maizy with his hefty cooking and his new way of doing the laundry. His carefree style does not impress everyone though, especially his rebellious teenage niece, Tia, and his impatient girlfriend, Chanice. With a little bit of luck and a lot of love, Uncle Buck manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: Star Trek IV: The Voyage Home
programme.desc: The Enterprise travels back in time to bring two humpback whales, whose extinction is closely linked to the end of the world, back into the 20th century.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Quadrophenia
programme.desc: Two rival youth cults emerge, the mods and the rockers with consequences. For Jimmy and his sharp-suited, pill-popping, being a mod is a way of life, it's their generation.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Against the Wall
programme.desc: A guard is caught up in a prison riot fuelled by bad prison management.

programme.title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Join the expedition visiting legendary Candy Man Willy Wonka in a splendiferous movie that wondrously brings to the screen the endlessly appetising delights of Roald Dahl's classic book. Coated with flavourful tunes and production design that constantly dazzles the eye, this effervescent musical never fails to enchant young and old. On a whirlwind tour of Willy's incredible, edible realm of chocolate waterfalls, elfish Oompa-Loompas and industrial-sized confections, a boy named Charlie will discover the sweetest secret of all: a generous, loving heart. And you'll rediscover the timeless magic of a delicious family classic.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: In the year 1971, San Francisco faces the terror of a maniac known as Scorpio, who snipes at innocent victims and demands ransom through notes left at the scene of the crime. Inspector Harry Callahan (known as Dirty Harry by his peers through his reputation handling of homicidal cases) is assigned to the case along with his newest partner Inspector Chico Gonzalez to track down Scorpio and stop him. Using humiliation and cat and mouse type of games against Callahan, Scorpio is put to the test with the cop with a dirty attitude.

programme.title: Sudden Impact
programme.desc: A victim of a savage rape exacts revenge on her aggressors in Clint Eastwood's fourth Dirty Harry movie. Considered to be the darkest, dirtiest and most violent one in the series.

programme.title: Jaws 3
programme.desc: When a young great white shark gets into a theme park, the manager keeps it for a new exhibit. But he didn't expect the angry mother to turn up looking for it.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities. But on his way out of town, Phil is caught in a giant blizzard, which he failed to predict, and finds himself stuck in small-town hell. Just when things couldn't get any worse, they do. Phil wakes the next morning to find it is Groundhog Day all over again and again and again.

programme.title: Scrooged
programme.desc: This surreal update of the Charles Dickens classic has a mean-spirited TV executive haunted into the Christmas spirit by three special time-travellers.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: The Replacement Killers
programme.desc: International superstar Chow Yun-Fat makes his Hollywood debut with Oscar (R) winner Mira Sorvino in THE REPLACEMENT KILLERS, a fierce and explosive action thriller from director Antoine Fuqua. After he betrays Mr. Wei, the ruthless crime boss who hired him to avenge his son's death, professional killer John Lee (chow Yun-Fat) goes on the run. Enlisting the aid of beautiful document forger Meg Coburn (Mira Sorvino), Lee attempts to return to his family in China before they are victimised by his betrayal. But Wei's army of "replacement killers" is hot on his trail, and now both he and Meg are targets of their impressive firepower. With both sides fully armed and determined to fight to the death, an ultra-violent shootout breaks out when they finally face off against each other.

programme.title: The Dirty Dozen
programme.desc: Twelve American soldiers, all criminals, get a chance at redemption on a killing mission in World War II.

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: With the title track sung by the Ramones fright meister Stephen King directs this chilling tale about a magical Indian burial ground. When his three-year-old son is killed on the road outside his home, Dr Louis Creed begins to think about the stories surrounding the ancient cemetery and how those buried there can be resurrected.

programme.title: Interview with the Vampire
programme.desc: A full-blooded insight into the centuries-old relationship between a regal vampire and his immortal victim, told through an interview with a journalist.

programme.title: The Dead Pool
programme.desc: Detective Harry Callahan probes the murders on a celebrity list that sickos bet on to pick who will die next. When he hears he's on the list, it gets deadly serious.

programme.title: The Last Outlaw
programme.desc: Left for dead by his bank robbing gang, a marauder joins a posse to seek revenge.

programme.title: A Beautiful Mind
programme.desc: Brilliant mathematician John Nash is on the brink of international acclaim when he becomes entangled in a mysterious conspiracy. Now only his devoted wife can help him in this powerful story of courage, passion and triumph.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Admiral Kirk battles his old nemesis Khan, who has pirated the Genesis device for his own evil ends.

programme.title: The Craft
programme.desc: Neve Campbell, Fairuza Balk and Robin Tunney star in this teen thriller about four private school misfits who form a coven to summon the dark forces they need to wreak havoc on their persecutors. Having just moved to Los Angeles, Sarah (Tunney) is an outsider at St. Benedict's Academy until she meets three other social outcasts. Nancy (Balk), Bonnie (ampbell) and Rochelle (Rachel True) will never fit in with the "in" crowd. Nancy, Bonnie and Rochelle dabble in the occult, and when they notice Sarah has the powers of a natural witch, they talk her into joining their coven. With the addition of a fourth witch they find they can cast spells they couldn't before, and the teenage witches are suddenly not only able to get the attention, praise and love they have long been denied, but also to exact vengeance on classmates, parents and boyfriends. They learn, however, that everything comes with a price. Support cast includes Skeet Ulrich and Rachel True.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: An extraordinary tale of hope, friendship and survival inside a maximum security prison. Andy Dufresne is a soft-spoken, respected Maine banker who is convicted for the murders of his unfaithful wife and her lover. He receives a double-life sentence and is shipped off to Shawshank State Prison, Maine's toughest maximum security penitentiary. Despised at first by the other inmates because of his introverted manner, he slowly forges an unlikely friendship with the prison fixer, Red, and they both learn that hope is the ultimate means of survival.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: The violent Cuban gangster Tony 'Scarface' Montana becomes a cocaine king in Miami. His greed and ego prove his undoing as ruthless rivals plot to take over his drug empire.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A squad of raw Marines endure boot camp under a terrifying drill instructor before descending into the horror of battle.

programme.title: Goodfellas
programme.desc: Based on the bestselling biography, Henry Hill is a small time gangster, who takes part in a violent robbery with two ambitious gangsters.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Xanadu
programme.desc: A look at the future and a loving remembrance of the way things were in the heyday of Hollywood.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: In a hotel room in Paris, a doctor comes out of the shower and finds that his wife has disappeared. He soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: Two drugged-out bike riders and a spaced-out lawyer go on an odyssey in search of the real America only to find violence and bigotry.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.desc: The Proteas will be looking to level the series in Cape Town after Pakistan secured a thrilling three wicket win in game one.
